text:
Pursuant to s.38(6) Children Act 1989 there shall be a residential assessment of [name] and the child[ren] paid for by the local authority, and the following shall be filed at court and served on the parties by [name]:

a mid-way report by 4.00pm on [date]; and

a final report by 4.00pm on [date].

Schedule of findings

(include this recital at any hearing where the court makes findings of fact)

[The court handed down judgment from the finding of fact hearing on [date] and made the findings in the schedule to this order.] / [The court gave an oral judgment on [date] at the finding of fact hearing and made the findings in the schedule to this order.]

(a schedule in this format, or a suitably adapted schedule to meet the needs of the particular case, should be appended to the order at any hearing at which findings are made)

Case No: [insert]

SCHEDULE OF FINDINGS MADE ON [DATE] BY [JUDGE]

On [date] [name of judge] [handed down judgment] / [gave an oral judgment] and made the following findings:

School / nursery reports

The local authority shall by 4.00pm on [date] file at court and serve on the parties a report from each school or nursery the child[ren] have attended in the previous 2 years detailing:

the child[ren]’s attendance and attainment;

parental engagement and co-operation;

any behavioural issues noted or observed or welfare concerns regarding the child[ren] (exhibiting any contemporaneous records);

any other matters relevant to the child[ren]’s welfare.

Section 91(14) Order
